title: XiaoguaiPackManifest
description: Schema for packs/*/pack.yaml — the operator-authored manifest that describes a Xiaoguai skill pack. Ground truth: crates/xiaoguai-core/src/packs.rs (PackManifest). Extended fields for pre-F1/F2 operator usage are allowed via additionalProperties/patternProperties.

version.description: SemVer version string (may include pre-release suffix, e.g. '1.3.4-prep').

description.description: Human-readable description of the pack's purpose.

kind.description: Pack kind qualifier. 'scaffold-only' indicates the pack ships sample corpus and must be replaced before production use.

feature_flag.description: Environment variable name that gates the pack's routes. Set to 'true' to activate.

xiaoguai_version.description: Minimum required xiaoguai platform version as a semver constraint (e.g. '>=1.3.1').

features.description: List of required xiaoguai platform feature flags.

llm.description: Whether an LLM provider must be configured.

outcome_telemetry.description: Whether outcome telemetry must be configured.

depends.description: External package/subsystem dependencies. Keys are dependency names; values are version strings, booleans, or objects.

additionalProperties.description: Dependency specification: a semver string, 'required', a boolean, or an object with version/optional/any keys.

dependencies.description: Runtime crate/adapter dependencies (used by hr-onboarding/research-paper-survey style manifests).

additionalProperties.description: Dependency entry: any object form (crate-based, required/note, or freeform).

external_systems.description: External system integrations with status and real_integration descriptions.

config.description: Operator-tunable configuration knobs for this pack.

migrations.description: Ordered list of SQL migration files applied on 'xiaoguai pack install'. Items may be bare path strings (shorthand) or {path} objects.

oneOf.description: Bare file path (shorthand), relative to pack root.

path.description: Path to the migration SQL file, relative to the pack root.

watches.description: WatchSpec YAML files to register into the watch registry on pack load. Items may be bare path strings, {path} objects, or {ref} objects.

oneOf.description: Bare file path (shorthand), relative to pack root.

anomalies.description: AnomalySpec YAML files to register into the anomaly registry on pack load. Items may be bare path strings or {path} objects.

oneOf.description: Bare file path (shorthand), relative to pack root.

agents.description: Agent definition files included in this pack.

oneOf.description: Bare file path shorthand (e.g. 'agents/triage-agent.yaml'), relative to pack root.

path.description: File path relative to pack root (used with bare 'path' key).

ref.description: File path relative to pack root (used with 'ref' key).

oneOf.description: Bare file path shorthand, relative to pack root.

sources.description: Webhook / event source file paths. Items may be bare path strings or {path} objects.

oneOf.description: Bare file path (shorthand), relative to pack root.

templates.description: Template files referenced by agents or outputs. Items may be bare path strings or {path} objects.

oneOf.description: Bare file path (shorthand), relative to pack root.

plan.description: Sequential execution plan steps. Each step references an agent or output adapter.

id.description: Unique step identifier within this plan.

agent.description: Agent name to invoke for this step.

output.description: Output adapter name to invoke for this step.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this step does.

deps.description: Step IDs that must complete before this step runs.

condition.description: Jinja2/template expression; step only runs when this evaluates truthy.

watch_event.description: Watch event name that triggers this step.

triggers.description: List of event names that trigger this step.

parallel.description: If true, this step runs concurrently with its predecessor(s).

plans.description: Named execution plans (used by knowledge-base-curator, security-audit style packs). Keys are plan names; values are plan step arrays.

schedules.description: Named schedule definitions (used by exec-briefing style packs).

dashboards.description: Dashboard definitions rendered in the admin-ui.

schema.description: Database schema namespace for this pack.

table_prefix.description: SQL table prefix applied to all pack-managed tables (e.g. 'ar_').

namespace.description: Logical namespace string used to scope migrations and queries.

outcome_telemetry.description: Outcome telemetry configuration for the improvement loop.

record_on.description: Event names that trigger an outcome record write.

feedback_table.description: Database table name where qualification/feedback rows are written.

embedding_model.description: Recommended embedding model for RAG packs (e.g. 'nomic-embed-text').

reranker.description: Reranker model identifier. Null to disable reranking.

top_k.description: Number of candidates retrieved before reranking.

top_k_final.description: Number of candidates retained after reranking.

collection_id.description: RAG collection identifier used when bulk-loading this pack.

corpus_dir.description: Path to the corpus directory, relative to the pack root.

prompts_dir.description: Path to the prompts directory, relative to the pack root.

hotl.description: Human-on-the-Loop (HotL) configuration for gated transitions and approvers.

reg_fd_policy.description: Regulation FD (Fair Disclosure) policy configuration for investor-relations packs.

pii_redact.description: PII redaction configuration — controls what fields are masked in audit logs.

tenant_scope.description: Tenant isolation scope for this pack (e.g. 'per-user', 'multi-tenant').

peer_packs.description: Peer pack references — other packs this pack calls into or delegates to.

caveats.description: Known limitations and caveats for this pack, for operator awareness.

^plan_[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$.description: Named plan variant (e.g. plan_daily, plan_weekly, plan_nps). May be a step array or an object with trigger+steps.

oneOf.description: Named plan with trigger and steps list.
